judgment.summary: A company with strong revenue growth and a low forward P/E, but facing declining earnings and low returns on equity and assets.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed consensus; next earnings date 2026-07-21.
positives: Revenue growth 46.3% YoY — significant top-line expansion.
Forward P/E 7.69x — valuation appears attractive relative to future earnings expectations.
PEG ratio 0.20 — suggests earnings growth may outpace the P/E multiple.
Quarterly earnings growth 54.8% — indicates recent profitability improvement.
Total cash $79.39B — substantial liquidity on the balance sheet.
negatives: Earnings growth -3.2% YoY — overall earnings have declined.
Return on equity 3.3% — low efficiency in generating profit from shareholder equity.
Return on assets 0.5% — low efficiency in generating profit from total assets.
Last quarter EPS missed estimate by 3.3%.

news.paragraph: Capital One Financial Corporation (COF) recently saw its board approve a quarterly dividend amidst reported top-line growth, suggesting operational stability. An analyst report from TD Cowen also provides a current perspective on the company. The upcoming earnings date is July 21st, which may serve as a catalyst for price movement.

headlines.title: Here’s What TD Cowen Thinks About Capital One Financial Corporation (COF)
